title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 11 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 11 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 11 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/09/2024
Today, iron ore opened low and moved higher, ﬂuctuating upward throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2501 closed at 694, up1.09% over the day. Traders showed a good willingness to sell, while speculative demand increased; some steel mills had restocking needs, enhancing their purchase willingness.
